title: neogaerrhinum filipes
side_effects: Neogaerrhinum filipes can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing nausea, dizziness, and stomach upset in some individuals due to its alkaloid content. Prolonged use or excessive consumption of the plant may lead to liver and kidney damage, as well as interact with certain medications. Additionally, improper preparation or handling of Neogaerrhinum filipes can cause skin irritation and allergic reactions in sensitive individuals. It is essential to consult a healthcare professional before using this plant for medicinal purposes to avoid these potential side effects.
